items.name: cn
items.title: cn (className utility)
items.description: Tiny helper that merges Tailwind classes safely. Combines clsx and tailwind-merge. Required dependency for every Aerodeck UI component.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Aerodeck Button. Four variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive) and three sizes (sm, md, lg). Includes all six microstates by default: default, hover, focus, active, disabled, loading. Use for any interactive action. Do not use for navigation links — use the Link primitive instead.
